title: DME AP Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 234 Senior Resident Posts
description: The Directorate of Medical Education (DME) Andhra Pradesh has announced the official notification for the recruitment of 234 Senior Resident Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in MBBS, MD/ MS, DNB, or Post Graduation can apply for this chance and apply for the DME AP Notification 2026 . Here we have included the age limit, selection process, and salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online by the l...
